# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any 
    
    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn clean install'
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn test'
            }
            post {
                always {
                    junit 'target/surefire-reports/*.xml'  // Replace with the actual path to your surefire reports
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                sh 'mvn deploy'   // Replace with your specific deployment command
            }
        }
    }
}
